title: Savage Combat
description: Adds better combat support to savage and ravage
body:
Adds better combat support to savage and ravage. The only weapon this adds support for is The Cleaver of Beheading and it uses Battle Staff animations and retains a two-handed weapon type, it swings very slowly but has wide sweeping attacks and some jabs.



Questions? Comments? Curiosity? Join our discord and talk about it
